contract.canonical_title: Advancing Process Verification for Large Language Models via Tree-Based Preference Learning

repo_identity: Paper-cited GitHub repository exists and is clonable
repo_runtime_signals: Repository contains planning pipeline READMEs with runnable command examples
not_verified: No explicit LICENSE file was found in the audited default branch snapshot
No official pretrained checkpoint release was found in audited repository docs
No benchmark-faithful one-command Tree-PLV verifier reproduction path was found

budget_and_compute_normalization.primary_rule: Report only declared max_tree_depth and num_candidates in each imported row; comparisons stay adjacent_only.
budget_and_compute_normalization.cross_method_claim_guardrail: Do not claim direct compute/control equivalence to branch-level marginal frontier allocation controllers.

exercised_in_this_lane: Canonical paper and paper-cited repository provenance validation
Repository structure and command-surface validation for the cited repo
Machine-readable artifact export for downstream comparison bundling
not_reproduced_in_this_lane: Full end-to-end Tree-PLV training stack reproduction
Canonical benchmark metric replication from official checkpoints

allowed_claims: Tree-PLV is integrated in this repository as an official-paper-cited adjacent baseline with a stable partial-runnable contract lane.
This lane validates provenance, contract completeness, optional cited-repo structure, and exports machine-readable adjacent-only artifacts.
Final classification in this repo lane is partial_runnable_adjacent, not full faithful reproduction.
forbidden_claims: Full faithful in-repo reproduction of the complete Tree-PLV paper stack.
Direct control-equivalent comparison with branch-level marginal budget-allocation methods.
Any claim that official released checkpoints were validated when none were verified in this pass.
